name: Gimme Gimme Disco Concert Cruise!
description: Celebrate GIMME GIMME DISCOON A BOAT!!! Set sail for a musical journey through NY Harbor, and the East River...dancing under the Brooklyn, Manhattan, and Williamsburg Bridges. You can bump, jump, groove, and hustle as we loop around the Statue of Liberty, take in the gorgeous views of the iconic NYC skyline, and bask in the fresh breeze that brings with it the freedom to move your feet and hips to the beat all night long. Dress to impress in your glitziest sparkles, high-waisted bell bottoms, dazzling sequins, or whatever gets you in the mood to dance!This cruise is aboard The Liberty Belle and will depart from Pier 36, 299 South Street. We will be begin boarding at 06:00 PM and starting the party at 6:30 PM and leaving the dock at 7pm! Dont miss the boat! Well return to the dock right around 10:00 PM**Last Call For Boarding is at 6:55 pm** **Please dont be late! You dont want to be standing on the dock, watching the party sail away**Bars & Food: there are plenty of bars on board and there will be food available for purchase by cash or card.Coat Check: there will be a coat & bag check available on board.Prohibited Items: please do not bring outside food, drinks, weapons, illegal substances, or pets. Just like going to a normal venue, on land.Questions? If you have any questions, please contact Sancho Dominguez (sancho@rocksoff.com) or check out the FAQ page on www.rocksoff.com**this event is *RAIN OR SHINE**
location_name: The Liberty Belle - Rocks Off Concert Cruise

description: Allan Harris: Harlem After Dark featuring Maya Azucena & AC LincolnAptly described by the Miami Herald as an artist blessed with the warmth of Tony Bennett, the bite and rhythmic sense of Sinatra, and the sly elegance of Nat King Cole, Allan Harris is a Brooklyn-born, Harlem-based vocalist, guitarist, songwriter, and band leader. With an impressive discography boasting fourteen recordings as a leader, Harris has established himself as one of the jazz worlds most acclaimed vocalists, possessing a potent combination of dynamic vocal abilities, impeccable phrasing, and powerful emotional resonance.My favorite singer. name: Rock Never Dies
description: Fall in Love with Rock All Over AgainInside the legendary Hard Rock Cafe in Times Square, discover an experience where music isnt just heard but felt.Rock Never Dies is a one-of-a-kind immersive theatrical event from American Immersion Theater that is part concert, part love story, and fully a magical journey. This groundbreaking production invites you to dine, drink, and fall headfirst into the soul of rock and roll.Enjoy a full three-course meal inside the Magical Mystery Museum of Hard Rock, a place where music has power, memories come alive, and one life is changed forever every night. Its an experience that inspires you to keep dreaming and march to the beat of your own drum.At the heart of the story is Caroline, a young artist whos lost hope and heart. As legendary music icons come to life around her, shes forced to confront love, loss, and the courage to take the stage again. Along the way, you wont just watch the story, but be part of it.Created by award-winning, immersive visionary Scott Cramton, often called the Willy Wonka of Immersive Theater, this joyful, high-energy spectacle blends iconic rock anthems with romance, comedy, and electrifying audience interaction.Whether youre on a date, celebrating something special, or just chasing that feeling music used to give you, this is your night.All it takesis one song,one moment,and a second chanceto change everything.
